title: Something in the Air
summary: Establish Ada's ordinary observatory rhythm and introduce the first subtle sky distortion as a quiet violation of normal reality.

narrative.newInfo: The anomaly appears first as perceptual inconsistency, not spectacle.
narrative.dripHook: Ada cannot prove what she saw, but cannot dismiss it either.
narrative.payoffDelivered: Reader baseline established: rational world, precise observer, first fracture.
narrative.notes: Cadence: low-intensity unease. Function: normality -> disturbance. Exit: Ada chooses to keep watching instead of dismissing.

rewardTokens.description: Grounded routine establishes trust in Ada's observational baseline.
First subtle air distortion appears without explicit explanation.
